From Our Kitchen

Menu Highlights

Bold spices, slow-cooked sauces, and recipes rooted in the Indian subcontinent. Every dish made fresh, every day.

Biryani

Fragrant basmati rice layered with slow-cooked meat, saffron, crispy onions, and aromatic whole spices. A Bengal house specialty.

House Specialty

Tandoori Chicken

Marinated overnight in yogurt and spices, then charred in our traditional clay tandoor oven for a smoky, fall-off-the-bone result.

Tandoor Fired

Tarka Daal

Slow-simmered yellow lentils finished with a sizzling tempering of cumin, garlic, and dried chilies. Vegetarian comfort food at its finest.

Vegetarian

Chicken Kari

Tender chicken pieces simmered in a rich onion-tomato gravy seasoned with hand-ground spices. Pairs perfectly with basmati rice or naan.

Customer Favorite

Vindaloo

A bold Goan-style curry with a fiery vinegar-chili base, slow-braised with tender meat. Rich, tangy, and unapologetically spicy.

Spicy

Lunch Buffet

A rotating spread of 10+ freshly prepared Indian dishes — curries, rice, breads, and desserts. Available every day from 11am to 3pm.

Daily 11am–3pm
View Full Menu
4.4★ 1,155 Google Reviews
Our Story

A Downtown Miami Gem for Authentic Indian Cuisine

Bengal Indian Cuisine brings the rich, layered flavors of the Indian subcontinent to the heart of downtown Miami. From the smoky char of our tandoor oven to the slow-simmered gravies and fragrant biryanis, every dish is crafted with care and served with warmth.

Located at 109 NE 1st Ave, we are a stone's throw from Miami's financial district — the perfect lunch spot or evening dinner destination. Our menu caters to everyone: meat lovers, vegetarians, vegans, and pescatarians, all under one roof.

We are proud to be 100% Halal certified, so every guest can dine with complete confidence.

✓ 100% Halal 🌿 Vegan 🐟 Pescatarian 🥗 Vegetarian
